/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++11 -flto -shared  -o stewart_ik.cpython-39-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/stewart_ik.dir/CMakeFiles/3.22.1/CompilerIdCXX/CMakeCXXCompilerId.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stewart_ik.dir/mldivide.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stewart_ik.dir/stewart_ik.cpp.o   -L/home/raincut/anaconda3/lib  -L/home/raincut/anaconda3/pkgs/python-3.9.7-h12debd9_1/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/raincut/anaconda3/lib:/home/raincut/anaconda3/pkgs/python-3.9.7-h12debd9_1/lib -lpython3.9
